name: The Handmaid's Tale RPG
description:
You can be a Handmaid ("walking womb"), Jezebel (prostituate), Wife, Commander, Guardian, Aunt (enforcer), Econowife, Martha (servant), Eye (Spy), Angel (soldier), or a rebel from outside Gilead.

In Gilead, your role is your prison. Handmaids are reduced to red-robed wombs, Jezebels serve in secret brothels, Wives wear blue and rule their households with icy resentment. Commanders preach purity while indulging in corruption, Aunts enforce obedience with cruelty dressed as scripture, and rebels risk their lives in shadows, clinging to scraps of freedom.

This RPG thrusts you into that world — suffocating, cruel, and steeped in hypocrisy. Every choice matters. You may bow your head and survive, or dare to resist and risk the Wall. Even silence can be dangerous here.
creator: Kitty Kat 666
